wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Sea Glass|2}}{{R|Sea Glass||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. Upon pickup, you see 15 cards from a class other than your own, and add any number of them to your deck.

The options always consist of 5 {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common|Commons|2}}, 5 {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommons|2}}, and 5 {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Rares|2}}.

== Obtaining Sea Glass ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 2|Act 2}}, can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.
===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Sea Glass''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Electric Shrimp||2}}, {{R|Glass Eye||2}}, {{R|Sand Castle||2}}, and {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}}, only 1 of the 5 can be offered by {{KW|Orobas||2}}.

==Notes==
This relic's name will be different depending on which class it offers cards from:
*{{2|Ironclad}}: Demon Glass
*{{2|Silent}}: Venom Glass
*{{2|Regent}}: Noble Glass
*{{2|Necrobinder}}: Lich Glass
*{{2|Defect}}: Gear Glass


== Update History ==

*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Sea Glass to the game.
